title: Kizaru Lands on Egghead
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Vegapunk, Law, Sanji, Unknown person #14, Luffy as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Franky! You guys all right? I just heard a big explosion over there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We did it! We cracked the code!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Franky-kun, the barrier can now be disabled! Have you brought the vegaforce 01 and the ship on the back of the island?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Your escape plan has been foiled, vegapunk...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your "Giant Robot of Dreams" has been blown to bits...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you send me flying all the way down!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've crossed the barrier two times! I thought I was gonna die!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
